overall.description: A first-person exploration of the Slytherin common room from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring gothic stone architecture, emerald drapery, and magical torchlight. The player character walks through various areas including the main hall, views a stained glass dome, explores a chess room, and proceeds down a corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room main hall with central stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the main hall toward the central draped archway

entered.detail: large stone archway with heavy dark green draped curtains
ornate carved stone column with gothic details
circular patterned rug on the stone floor
lit wall-mounted torch providing warm light
lit wall-mounted torch providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit gothic common room with stone pillars and arches. The camera faces a large central archway draped with dark fabric, with ornate rugs covering the marble floor and wall sconces providing warm torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room center under stained glass dome

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing the illuminated stained glass dome with blue-green moonlight filtering through
camera tilts down from the dome to focus on the central birdcage structure

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to admire the stained glass dome ceiling, then looking down at the ornate birdcage in the center of the room

entered.detail: large circular stained glass window in the ceiling with intricate blue and green patterns
gothic ribbed vaulting on the ceiling surrounding the dome
large decorative metal birdcage with intricate scrollwork standing on the floor

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a magnificent stained glass dome set into the vaulted stone ceiling, casting colored light downward. It then tilts down to show an ornate birdcage structure in the center of the chamber, surrounded by gothic arches.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room side chamber with chess set and tall arched windows

agents.ego_description: walking around the chess table and admiring the tall arched windows with blue night sky visible outside

tall gothic arched window with leaded glass showing dark blue night sky

dark wooden table near the chess set

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a side chamber with three tall arched windows revealing the night sky. A large decorative chess set sits on a checkered rug in the foreground, with wooden furniture arranged around the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between chess room and main hall with fireplace

events.description: camera moves past the chess set toward the fireplace area on the right
camera turns and moves back toward the main central hall area

agents.ego_description: walking past the chess set toward the lit fireplace, then turning to face back toward the main hall archway

entered.detail: stone fireplace with burning fire providing warm orange light
wooden writing desk with papers and objects on top

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the chess set toward a lit fireplace set into the stone wall, then turns to reveal the main hall archway ahead. A wooden desk sits near the fireplace, and the warm firelight contrasts with the cool blue tones of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: main common room area with students sitting on furniture

events.description: other students become visible sitting on couches and chairs in the common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall observing other students sitting on the velvet couches and chairs

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a blue couch reading a book
student sitting at a wooden table studying

entered.detail: dark blue velvet upholstered couch with high back
dark blue velvet upholstered couch with students sitting on it

recessed wall niche containing a stone statue

segments.scene_description: The scene returns to the main common room area where students in dark robes are now visible, sitting on blue velvet couches and studying at tables. The camera approaches the central draped archway, with stone statues visible in wall niches on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor with draped curtains leading to inner chambers

events.description: camera enters the central archway corridor with heavy draped curtains

agents.ego_description: walking through the heavy draped curtains into the stone corridor beyond

entered.detail: heavy dark green fabric curtains draping down at the corridor entrance
rough-hewn stone wall of the corridor with gothic carvings
rough-hewn stone wall of the corridor with gothic carvings
burning brazier providing light at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the heavy draped curtains into a narrower stone corridor. The walls are rough-hewn stone with gothic details, and a lit brazier burns in the distance at the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit gothic common room that eventually leads into a narrow, secluded stone corridor. It begins amidst stone pillars and marble floors under warm torchlight, before tilting upward to reveal a magnificent stained glass dome and an ornate central birdcage. The camera then shifts into a side chamber featuring a decorative chess set and arched windows overlooking the night sky, moving past a glowing fireplace and a wooden desk where warm firelight contrasts with cool blue tones. As the view returns to the main hall, the scene opens up to reveal students in dark robes studying on velvet couches before the camera approaches a central draped archway flanked by stone statues. Finally, the movement carries the viewer through heavy curtains and into a rough-hewn stone passage, heading toward a solitary burning brazier in the distance.
